# Intercom Pi

This project is a tutorial on building a gate intercom using a SIM868 module and a Raspberry Pi, along with various other components.

## Aim

The aim is to end up with a gate-mounted system that can do the following:
- Allow a visitor to input a unit number
- Call the owner of the unit and allow them to converse with the visitor
- Allow the unit owner to press a key on their phone to open the gate for their visitor
- Various other error handling procedures and alternative flows  

## Resources

- Each section (in the sidebar) of this project contains steps to build up the IntercomPi
- All code is hosted on <a href="https://github.com/JasP19/IntercomPi" target="_blank">Github</a>

Let's [get started](/projects/IntercomPi/02_Requirements/).
